inspection_summary: Exact clean HEAD 3ba30980 was reviewed across Story, Architecture, Spec, Task projection, implementation, current-bound verification, adjudication, validation sequencing, responsibility authority, failure-mode coverage, review lifecycle, artifact consistency, and architecture conformance. Story has 8/8 completed acceptance criteria; canonical Spec clauses map Story to Architecture, code, and tests; seven closure tasks are done and the remaining VP-TASK-ARCH-001 is a separate responsibility-split campaign, not unfinished closure acceptance. Verification evidence is strict-head bound and clean: focused 290/290, public CLI E2E 4/4, runtime/session/cost integration 64/64, docs build pass, and typecheck pass. Validation sequencing has all five phases passed on 3ba30980. Acceptance adjudication is fresh 8/8 demonstrated and judgment adjudication is fresh 16/16 judged_sound with no unsound or pending correction. Responsibility authority passes with 6 matched responsibilities, 4 matched domain clauses, and zero missing, stale, unregistered, or invalid entries. Failure paths cover timeout, parse failure, provider failure, retry/async failure, evidence lifecycle regression, workflow-state regression, human decision, verification failure, repair convergence, no progress, quota, CI pending, and cancellation. Latest-main target conformance is advisory because the target model is draft, but the measured total is non-worsening at baseline/current 86/86; current composition adds no run-session-to-CLI reverse dependency. The canonical pr-prepare remains needs_verification only because strict-head gate_evidence and release_risk results from the prior HEAD are stale. The gate lifecycle now shows exactly two current-HEAD running replacements: gate-final-3ba30980 and release-final-3ba30980. Therefore agent_review and artifact_consistency are current lifecycle completion work, not a remaining substantive evidence defect; after both reviewers are closed and recorded, pr prepare must be rerun.
judgment_delta: Initial judgment was needs_changes at 56d69700 because validation sequencing was invalidated and current-head acceptance/judgment adjudication was absent. Final judgment is pass at 3ba30980 because all five validation phases are rebound and passed, adjudication is complete at 8/8 and 16/16, exact-head verification is clean and passing, responsibility and failure-mode evidence is complete, and the only critical canonical blockers are the two intentionally running strict-head gate review lifecycles plus their derivative stale-review artifact consistency.

findings.summary: Canonical readiness is not yet green solely because the two current strict-head gate reviewers are still running and their replacement results have not yet been recorded.
findings.required_action: Close and record gate-final-3ba30980 and release-final-3ba30980 with current-head strict binding, then rerun vibepro pr prepare. This is lifecycle completion, not a needs_changes finding.

findings.summary: Draft target-model conformance is baseline/current 86/86. The composition changes the advisory mix from 65/9/12 to 66/9/11 for undeclared/budget/orphan counts without worsening the total or adding a run-session-to-CLI reverse dependency.
